blocks.text: Suzuka calling: the 2026 F1 title race hits a classic circuit
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Aramco Japanese Grand Prix, Suzuka — early championship points up for grabs
Russell leads Antonelli 51–47 in the drivers' standings — the tightest gap at the top this early in a season in years. Suzuka's unforgiving layout will tell us a lot about who really has pace.
🚴 Fri 11:52 — E3 Saxo Classic — Abrahamsen and Hoelgaard fly Norwegian colours on Belgian cobbles
🚴 Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem — Wærenskjold is Norway's best shot at a Spring Classic result
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates 2026 — the World Championship challenger quest begins
